name: OCULOPS — UI DNA v2
purpose: Single source of truth for all screen generation via Google Stitch. Every value is forensically derived from master reference images. No value is estimated — each is anchored to a specific image observation.

master_references.primary_master: oculops_sidebar_navigation.png — golden sphere, Intelligence module, cream sidebar
master_references.secondary_master: IMG_2536.WEBP — Intelligence Amplified annotated, design intent labels
master_references.warm_variant: IMG_2528.WEBP — Control Tower IVORY, full sidebar, capsule quick actions
master_references.agent_warm: IMG_2529.WEBP — AI Agents warm, Cortex master card, 3-column sub-agent grid
master_references.agent_clean: IMG_2530.WEBP — AI Agents v2, cleaner variant, confidence pills, capability tags
master_references.prospector: IMG_2531.WEBP — Prospector/Map, dark map + gold overlay, flight command panel
master_references.mobile: IMG_2532.WEBP — Mobile Control Tower, shows KPI cards at scale, health score ring
master_references.dark_variant: IMG_2533.WEBP — Dark variant, yellow-on-black cards, shows alternate treatment
master_references.design_system: IMG_2535.WEBP — Component design system, neumorphic surfaces, signal shimmer annotations
master_references.master_branded: oculops_master_branded_dashboard.png — full branded master with health score 39, pipeline €242k
master_references.current_gap_1: current-ivory/01_control_tower.png — CURRENT STATE: sparse, flat, no depth
master_references.current_gap_2: current-ivory/09_agents.png — CURRENT STATE: empty agent view, no cards
master_references.current_gap_3: current-ivory/05_intelligence.png — CURRENT STATE: basic signal list, no visualization

gap_analysis.summary: The current app (v2) reads as a functional wireframe. The target design reads as a $5,000/mo intelligence instrument. The gap is in material depth, typographic weight, visual hierarchy, the golden sphere system, and agent card richness.
current_problems: Sidebar: flat white, no warm cream gradient, nav items have no visual weight difference between active/inactive
KPI cards: no icon containers with semantic color backgrounds, no bottom target text treatment, no micro-progress bars
Health score ring: exists but black background treatment (IMG_2532 dark variant) — target is warm cream ring on white
Agent module: completely empty — zero card content rendered in current-ivory/09_agents.png
Intelligence module: basic table, no golden sphere, no neural network visualization, no signal strength bars
Typography: inconsistent weight usage — headlines not using the tight letter-spacing of -0.015em to -0.03em
No golden sphere element on any screen
Quick action buttons: currently rendered as yellow pills — target is capsule outline buttons (border, not fill)
Card shadows too thin — missing the layered soft-neumorphic shadow stack
priority_fixes: 1. Sidebar warm cream treatment + active state gold background
2. KPI card icon containers + full shadow stack + progress target
4. Agent cards — Cortex master + sub-agent 3-column grid
5. Intelligence golden sphere + neural network visualization

design_philosophy.identity: Apple × Whisk × TouchDesigner — boutique premium AI operating system
design_philosophy.aesthetic_sentence: A general's war room viewed through a premium optical instrument. Every surface is matte, every accent is signal. The UI has physical presence — it does not float in a void.
design_philosophy.pricing_signal: Every visual decision must communicate that this is a $5,000/mo tool, not a $50/mo SaaS. Premium is achieved through restraint, precision, and depth — not decoration.
anti_patterns: Flat Material Design — no depth, everything same plane
Dark war-room terminal — we are IVORY/warm, not black
Glassmorphism blur-everything — reserved for modals only
Generic SaaS blue/purple — yellow is the sole brand accent
Dribbble fantasy UI — every element must be implementable
Noisy typography — only 3 text color levels used: primary, secondary, tertiary
Dense information without hierarchy — white space is structural
Emoji icons — Material Symbols Outlined only
Hard borders as structure — depth from shadows, not thick outlines
Yellow as decoration — gold is a SIGNAL color, maximum 5% visual surface area

background.description: Warm off-white — not pure white, not gray. Has a subtle parchment warmth. Observable in IMG_2528, IMG_2529, IMG_2530, IMG_2536.
background.texture: Imperceptible noise grain at 1.5-2% opacity layered on top. Prevents digitally-flat appearance.
background.vignette: Radial gradient from transparent at center to rgba(0,0,0,0.02) at viewport edges. Creates subtle focus inward.

ambient_light_model.implication: Card shadows fall southeast. Top-left edge of all raised elements catches slightly more light. Inner highlight on top edge of every card.
ambient_light_model.source: Consistent across all reference images — soft diffused overhead panel, no directional harsh light.

depth_model.name: Soft Hybrid Neumorphism
depth_model.description: NOT classic neumorphism (no extreme emboss). Cards float 2-4px above the canvas. Depth created through shadow opacity stacks, not border thickness or color contrast.

elevation_levels.1_card: Standard cards — 2px float: box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.03), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.80)
elevation_levels.2_elevated: Cortex master card, hero panels — 4px float: box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.07), 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.80)
elevation_levels.3_hero: Hero visualization panel, golden sphere container — 8px float: box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.80)
elevation_levels.4_modal: Modals, drawers — 16px float: box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)
elevation_levels.inset: Input fields, progress tracks, toggle tracks: box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)

depth_model.inner_highlight_rule: Every raised surface has: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.80) — a 1px top edge bright highlight simulating the northwest light source catching the card edge. This is the single most important detail that creates the premium material feel.

inset.role: Input fields, recessed areas, search bar bg

sidebar.role: Navigation sidebar — warm cream, visually distinct from content

default.usage: All standard 1px borders on cards, dividers

subtle.usage: Row separators within tables, lightest dividers

gold_card.usage: Cortex card, primary KPI card border tint

gold_hero.usage: Outer glow bleed on golden sphere container

primary.role: All headlines, values, primary body. The only 'black'.

secondary.role: Labels, descriptions, nav items inactive, card sublabels

tertiary.role: Section headers uppercase, placeholders, timestamps, grid overlays

inverse.role: Text on solid gold CTA buttons, text on dark banner

gold_accent.role: Darkened gold for text — used where #FFD700 would be unreadable

pure.usage: Solid fills: CTA buttons, health ring arc, active toggle, signal bars, active nav bg-tinted

bright.usage: Sphere inner ring, brightest gold gradient stop

text.usage: All gold text — never pure #FFD700 on white (too low contrast)

text_deep.usage: Gold text on light gold backgrounds

muted_10.usage: Active nav item background, tag backgrounds

muted_25.usage: Border tint on primary KPI card, OPPORTUNITY badge border

muted_glow.usage: Sphere ambient glow on surrounding surfaces

gold_spectrum.distribution_rule: Gold must not exceed 5% of total visual surface area. It is a SIGNAL. Its rarity is what makes it carry weight.

success.usage: Online status, completed states, positive trends

color_system.rule: Semantic colors appear ONLY in status dots, badges, and directional trend indicators. Never as backgrounds, large borders, or decorative surfaces. Yellow is the sole brand accent.

families.mono: JetBrains Mono, SF Mono, Fira Code, monospace
families.rule: NEVER hardcode font strings. All tokens are CSS variables. Sans-serif for all operational UI. Mono only for data values, timestamps, coordinates, code.

micro.usage: Footnotes, version numbers, grid overlay labels

xs.usage: Section headers uppercase, badge text, KPI labels, table headers, captions

sm.usage: Nav items, table body, button text, body paragraphs, card body text, tag text

lg.usage: Agent names in sub-agent cards, metric values in Cortex card

xl.usage: Cortex metrics row values, medium KPI values

4xl.usage: Health score ring center number, large stat values

hero.usage: OCULOPS wordmark in hero banner, landing-grade display

usage_map.kpi_value_large: JetBrains Mono 700 32px/0/1.1 #1A1A1A — for numeric-only values to signal data precision
usage_map.caption: Inter 400 11px/0.02em #9A9A9A
usage_map.mono_data: JetBrains Mono 400 9-10px/0 #9A9A9A — grid overlays, coordinate labels on sphere

radius_system.md: 8px  — buttons, inputs, nav items, icon containers
radius_system.lg: 12px — cards, panels, main content areas, KPI cards
radius_system.full: 9999px — pill buttons, status badges, capsule CTAs, toggle tracks

golden_sphere_system.description: The signature visual element of OCULOPS. A luminous golden energy sphere with neural network tendrils, rendered as a TouchDesigner-style generative data visualization. Observable in oculops_sidebar_navigation.png and IMG_2536.WEBP annotations.
golden_sphere_system.classification: 3D volumetric render aesthetic — NOT a flat SVG. Reads as a real-time simulation output. Has depth-of-field blur on extremities.

dimensions.hero_intelligence: 400x400px visual footprint in the hero panel of the Intelligence module
dimensions.header_widget: Not shown as a full sphere — only the ambient glow bleeds into surrounding surfaces
dimensions.animation_feel: Constant subtle rotation implied — like a slowly turning neural energy mass

color_layers.core_white: #FFFFFF — pure white emission at the absolute center, hot point
color_layers.inner_ring: #FFE44D — bright yellow halo immediately surrounding the core, 15-20px band
color_layers.mid_body: #FFD700 — standard gold fills the main sphere body
color_layers.outer_body: #CC9900 — darker amber at 70-80% of sphere radius outward
color_layers.tendril_tips: #997700 — darkest gold at the extremities of the energy filaments
color_layers.particle_dots: #FFD700 at 20-60% opacity — tiny scattered dots floating around the sphere in 3D space
color_layers.ambient_glow: radial-gradient from rgba(255,215,0,0.15) at sphere center to transparent at 300px radius. Bleeds onto surrounding white card surface and sidebar.

golden_sphere_system.internal_gradient: Radial from white core outward: #FFFFFF → #FFE44D → #FFD700 → #CC9900 → #997700 at edges

tendrils.description: Organic branching filaments, like neural dendrites or lightning captured in amber. NOT geometric or straight.
tendrils.count: Dozens of branching arms extending from the sphere surface
tendrils.style: 1-2px thick, variable opacity (30-80%), blur increases with distance from sphere
tendrils.color: #FFD700 at root, fading to rgba(255,215,0,0.15) at tips
tendrils.animation_principle: Tendrils feel like they are slowly shifting/breathing — no sharp movement

neural_network_overlay.description: In IMG_2536, a distinct neural network diagram is shown — nodes as circles connected by gold lines
neural_network_overlay.node_style: 12-16px hollow circles, stroke 1.5px, fill: white or rgba(255,215,0,0.08)
neural_network_overlay.node_accent: Some nodes have gold fill at 100% — these represent active/signal nodes
neural_network_overlay.connection_lines: 1px lines at 20-40% opacity gold (#FFD700), connecting all nodes in a network topology
neural_network_overlay.connection_active: Lines between active nodes are fully opaque gold, 1.5px
neural_network_overlay.layout: Left-to-right neural layer structure: input layer → hidden layers → output layer

background_grid.description: Behind the sphere: subtle wireframe geometric grid
background_grid.perspective: Perspective-corrected, vanishing point behind the sphere center, creating depth
background_grid.intersection_dots: 3-4px dots at grid crossings, same opacity as lines

floating_data_labels.description: Scattered around the sphere: floating coordinate pairs, percentages, data values
floating_data_labels.positioning: Seemingly random but following tendril paths — 3D scattered placement

container.type: Large hero card in the Intelligence module main panel
container.background: #FFFFFF with the golden glow bleeding onto it from the sphere
container.overflow: visible — sphere bleeds slightly beyond card boundaries for depth effect
container.outer_glow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,215,0,0.08) — the card itself has a faint gold outer glow

scaling_per_screen.intelligence_hero: Full sphere render, 400px, dominates upper-right of module
scaling_per_screen.control_tower_health: Health score ring — gold arc on gray track, 120px ring, NOT the sphere itself but the gold arc is the same gold energy color
scaling_per_screen.agents_cortex: Cortex master card has a small 40x40px circular icon container with a gold background — a micro-echo of the sphere. The yellow border on the Cortex card references the sphere's gold energy.
scaling_per_screen.pipeline_won_column: Kanban column header background uses gold tint for 'Won' state
scaling_per_screen.prospector_map: Yellow/gold polygon overlays on dark Mapbox map represent target scan zones — same gold, different surface
scaling_per_screen.signal_bars_table: 4px tall horizontal bars in #FFD700 — the sphere energy materialized as data signal visualization
scaling_per_screen.active_nav_item: rgba(255,215,0,0.10) background with 1px gold border — micro echo of sphere's warmth
scaling_per_screen.health_score_ring: #FFD700 arc on #E5E5E0 track — the sphere's gold concentrated into a ring glyph
scaling_per_screen.kpi_progress_bar: Gold fill on gray track under the 'SIGNALS' KPI card — 4px bar
scaling_per_screen.button_cta: Solid #FFD700 background — the sphere's core color as the primary action signal

level_0_canvas.description: Page background. Visible between cards, in sidebar gutters, behind content.

level_1_panel.description: Cards, content panels. The dominant UI surface. Matte white — no specular highlight.

level_2_inset.description: Table header rows, slightly recessed secondary surfaces.

level_3_field.description: Input fields, search bars, toggle tracks, progress bar tracks. Recessed into level_1 surface.

level_4_sidebar.description: Sidebar only. Warm cream — clearly different temperature from content white.

card_material.surface: #FFFFFF matte — no sheen, no gloss, no specular highlight
card_material.top_edge: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.80) — 1px white highlight simulating light catching the raised top edge
card_material.hover_transition: box-shadow transitions to 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.07), 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04) over 200ms ease
card_material.micro_texture: Imperceptible noise grain at 1.5% opacity — prevents digitally-flat surface

cortex_card_material.note: The only card with a gold gradient background. All other agent cards are pure white.

primary_kpi_card_material.note: MRR card — the primary revenue KPI — gets the gold border tint. Signals it as the most important metric.

glass_overlay.usage: Modal overlays, tooltip panels, floating menus only — not card surfaces

dark_banner_variant.description: The system activity summary hero banner uses a dark treatment in some variants (IMG_2533 dark, IMG_2528 warm light). Standard variant: #1A1A1A background with white text and yellow CTA.
dark_banner_variant.texture: Subtle topographic/contour line pattern at 8% opacity in a warm tone — visible in IMG_2533
dark_banner_variant.usage: Control Tower hero banner top strip only

grid.responsive: Desktop-only SaaS. Not designed for mobile (IMG_2532 mobile is Electron/tablet view only). Reflow at 1280px: 3-col KPI. At 1024px: 2-col KPI, sidebar collapses.

content_grids.kpi_4col: CSS Grid, 4 equal columns, 16px gap — standard KPI row
content_grids.kpi_3col: CSS Grid, 3 equal columns, 16px gap — secondary KPI row or 1280px breakpoint
content_grids.agent_3col: CSS Grid, 3 equal columns, 20px gap — sub-agent cards
content_grids.two_col_hero: 2-column layout: 60% hero panel + 40% sidebar panel for Intelligence/Control Tower hero area
content_grids.full_width: 100% content width — tables, banners, the Cortex master card

header.left: Module icon (24px) + module title (Inter 700 24px #1A1A1A) — e.g. '⚡ Control Tower'

live_badge_detail.dot: 8px circle, #34C759, box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(52,199,89,0.50), CSS animation: pulse scale(1)→scale(1.2) 2s ease-in-out infinite

sidebar.golden_ambient: rgba(255,210,50,0.06) radial gradient centered at hero sphere position bleeding into lower sidebar — creates warmth bleed from Intelligence hero

logo_area.logo_mark: Circle with inner ring glyph, #FFD700, 28-32px diameter. Observable in IMG_2529, IMG_2530, IMG_2532, IMG_2536.
logo_area.tagline_chip: In some variants: 'AI Intelligence OS Signal' chip below logo — background: rgba(255,215,0,0.10), border: 1px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.20), border-radius: 9999px, padding: 2px 10px, font: Inter 11px 600 #C8A200

nav_item_active.left_accent: Some variants show border-left: 3px solid #FFD700 — use this for strongest active signaling

sidebar.item_spacing: 2px gap between items within a section

footer.avatar_or_logout: 32-40px circular avatar or icon button at right

kpi_card.description: The standard metric display unit. Appears in 4-column or 3-column grids.
kpi_card.dimensions: ~200px wide x 140px tall in 4-col grid. Full-width at 1280px breakpoint with 2-col.
structure_layers: 1. Icon container — top-left, 32x32px, border-radius: 8px, background: semantic-muted-10, icon 20px matching semantic color
2. Value — Inter 700 32px #1A1A1A, dominant element, below icon or beside icon
3. Label — Inter 600 11px uppercase letter-spacing: 0.04em #6B6B6B, below value
4. Target line — Inter 400 11px #9A9A9A, 'Target: €20k', at bottom of card
5. Optional: mini gold progress bar 4px tall on bottom edge for SIGNALS card — track: #E5E5E0, fill: #FFD700

primary_kpi_variant.note: Only this card gets the gold border tint

value_color_overrides.gold_accent: #C8A200 — signal count when it represents opportunity

health_score_widget.fill_color: linear gradient #FFD700 → #FFC400 rendered as animated stroke-dasharray
health_score_widget.label: Inter 700 10px uppercase letter-spacing: 0.15em #6B6B6B — 'HEALTH SCORE'
health_score_widget.container_note: In IMG_2528 the health ring sits in a dedicated card in the KPI row, same dimensions as KPI cards

cortex_master_card.description: Full-width special card at the top of the AI Agents module. The master orchestrator's command card.

structure.header_row: CORTEX icon-container (40x40px gold bg, #C8A200 brain/cortex icon) + 'CORTEX' Inter 700 24px #1A1A1A + 'Head Orchestrator' Inter 400 13px #6B6B6B + LIVE badge (green dot + pill) — all left-aligned. Action buttons right-aligned.
structure.metrics_row: Three metric blocks: Runs | Average Time | Last Run. Each: label 11px #9A9A9A above, value Inter 700 20px #1A1A1A below. Separated by 1px vertical dividers in #E5E5E0.
structure.orchestration_bar: Full-width progress indicator below metrics. Background: #F0F0EB, fill: animated gold gradient. Height: 8px, border-radius: 4px. Represents current Cortex cycle progress.
structure.action_buttons_row: Capsule outline buttons: '+Añadir Lead', '◉Nueva Señal', '▣ Crear Tarea', '✎ Nuevo Experimento', '⊕ Buscar Leads', '💬 Ver Mensajes'. Each: border 1px #E5E5E0, border-radius: 8px, padding: 8px 16px, Inter 500 13px, icon prefix 16px.
structure.playback_controls: Right side: + (add), pause, play, settings icon buttons. Each 40x40px.

live_badge.pill: background: rgba(52,199,89,0.10), border: 1px solid rgba(52,199,89,0.20), color: #34C759, Inter 700 11px, border-radius: 9999px, padding: 2px 10px

sub_agent_card.description: Cards for ATLAS, FORGE, HERALD, HUNTER, ORACLE, SCRIBE, etc. Grid of 3 columns.

structure.header: Agent icon (28px, themed per agent) + agent name (Inter 700 18px #1A1A1A uppercase) + Online badge (top-right, green dot pill). All on same row.
structure.capability_tags: Row of pill tags: background: #F0F0EB, border: 1px solid #E5E5E0, border-radius: 6px, padding: 3px 10px, Inter 500 11px #6B6B6B. 6px gap. Examples: 'Capability', 'Redeshing', 'Consistanies'.
structure.body_text: Inter 400 13px #6B6B6B, line-height: 1.5, 2-3 lines of current intelligence task description.
structure.confidence_pills: OPPORTUNITY/RISK badge + HIGH/MEDIUM severity badge + '85% CONFIDENT' text. All in a horizontal row with 6px gap.
structure.footer: 'OPERATIONAL LOGIC →' — Inter 600 11px uppercase #9A9A9A + right arrow icon. Clickable to expand.

agent_icon_treatments.ATLAS: Compass-rose / satellite dish icon, muted amber tinted container
agent_icon_treatments.FORGE: Flame icon, warm orange tinted container

data_row.hover_bg: rgba(255,215,0,0.04) — imperceptible warm gold tint, not solid color

signal_strength_column.header_bg: background: rgba(255,215,0,0.15), border-radius: 4px, padding: 4px 8px — highlights this as THE key intelligence column

quick_action_buttons.description: Horizontal scrollable row of capsule buttons below the hero banner. Observable in IMG_2528 and IMG_2530.
quick_action_buttons.style: OUTLINE capsule — NOT filled gold. Common mistake: making these solid yellow. They are outline/ghost.

spec.icon_prefix: 16px icon, same color as text, 8px gap

primary_cta_button.note: The only fully gold-filled button. Used for primary actions per module: 'Scan Query' on Prospector, 'EN VIDO' on dark banner CTA.

status_badges.confidence_text: Inter 600 11px #6B6B6B — '85% CONFIDENT' inline after severity badge

search_bar.focus_state: border: 1px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.40), box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,215,0,0.10), background: #FFFFFF
search_bar.note: In IMG_2536 the focused search bar has a gold focus ring — this is the key distinction from generic search

modal.header: border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E5E0, padding-bottom: 16px, Inter 700 18px #1A1A1A + close button top-right

base_style.standard_light: Warm cream base map matching app palette for Intelligence/World Monitor
base_style.dark_for_prospector: Dark (#1A1A1A base) map used in Prospector/Scan — observable in IMG_2531. Dark map lets gold overlays maximum contrast.

gold_overlays.intent: Target territories and scan zones rendered as gold on dark map

controls.zoom_buttons: White bg, subtle border, positioned top-right, same button spec as outline_button

hero_banner.description: Top-of-page system status banner in Control Tower. Two variants: light (IVORY, IMG_2528) and dark (IMG_2533).

light_variant.subtitle: Inter 400 16px #6B6B6B — 'system activity summary'
light_variant.live_chip: border: 1px solid #E5E5E0, border-radius: 8px, padding: 8px 16px — 'LIVE / ACTIVE INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM' Inter 600 12px uppercase #6B6B6B. Green dot prefix.

dark_variant.texture: Topographic contour lines at 8% opacity, warm amber tint
dark_variant.title: Inter 500 14px #FFFFFF — 'system activity summary'
dark_variant.subtitle: Inter 400 12px rgba(255,255,255,0.60) — 'live / active intelligence system'
dark_variant.cta_button: background: #FFD700, color: #1A1A1A, border-radius: 9999px, padding: 10px 24px, Inter 600 13px — 'EN VIDO →'

progress_bar.usage: KPI cards bottom edge (SIGNALS card), Cortex orchestration bar (8px tall variant), agent confidence bars

chart_line.health_chart_area: #FFD700 stroke on white background, fill: rgba(255,215,0,0.12)
chart_line.note: Charts use gold as the primary data color. The bar chart in IMG_2535 'Hero uncare' shows gold bars with increasing heights Mon-Sat.

select_dropdown.active_option: background: rgba(255,215,0,0.10), color: #C8A200 — confirmed by IMG_2535 'Yellow' selected state with gold checkmark

motion_system.philosophy: Even in static renders, the interface must FEEL alive. Motion is implied through visual cues: pulsing dots, directional arrows, layered shadows that suggest 'just hovered'. The overall impression is a living, breathing intelligence instrument.

breathing_status.description: Observable in IMG_2535 annotation: 'Breathing Status Indicator'. Active status indicators scale-pulse.
breathing_status.animation: scale(1) → scale(1.2) → scale(1) over 2s ease-in-out infinite
breathing_status.elements: LIVE dot in header, agent Online dots, health score ring fill
breathing_status.css_keyframes: @keyframes pulse { 0%,100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } 50% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 0.8; } }

signal_shimmer.description: Observable in IMG_2535 annotation: 'Live data shimmer'. Gold particles flow along data connections.
signal_shimmer.visual: A moving gradient shimmer on the Cortex orchestration bar and the golden sphere neural connection lines
signal_shimmer.css: background: linear-gradient(90deg, #FFD700 0%, #FFE44D 50%, #FFD700 100%), background-size: 200% 100%, animation: shimmer 2s linear infinite

micro_glow.description: Observable in IMG_2535 annotation: 'Micro glow'. Active elements have a subtle outer glow.
micro_glow.elements: Active nav item, selected card, primary CTA button on hover
micro_glow.css: box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,215,0,0.08) — transitioning from 0 on inactive

gold_border_pulse.description: The border on the Cortex card oscillates between opacity 0.15 and 0.30 over 3s — makes the card feel like it is breathing with gold energy.

card_hover_lift.description: On hover, cards lift slightly — shadow expands from elevation-1 to elevation-2

data_refresh_sweep.description: When data refreshes, a golden sweep animation passes across the card from left to right
data_refresh_sweep.css: A 200ms linear gradient sweep from left (rgba(255,215,0,0.06)) to right (transparent) over the card surface

sphere_ambient.description: The golden sphere implies constant slow rotation and particle drift. In static renders: the tendril paths and particle positions are the 'frozen moment' of this animation.
sphere_ambient.rotation_speed_implied: ~20 seconds per full rotation — extremely slow, meditative
sphere_ambient.particle_drift: Individual dots drift outward from sphere center on independent curved paths

persistent_chrome.sidebar: Identical across all screens. Same width, same background, same nav items. Active item changes per screen.
persistent_chrome.header: Height 56px, module icon + title left, search center, LIVE badge right. The module title and icon change per screen.
persistent_chrome.live_indicator: Always visible in header top-right. Green dot pulse never stops.

intelligence_module.adaptation: FULL golden sphere hero — the primary, unreduced manifestation
intelligence_module.placement: Upper-right of content area, 60% width panel, 350-400px tall
intelligence_module.extras: Neural network diagram shown alongside KPI metrics. The sphere IS the feature.

control_tower.adaptation: Health score ring — gold arc on gray track. Same gold (#FFD700), same energy, distilled to a ring
control_tower.placement: Left side of KPI metrics row, full card with the ring centered
control_tower.extras: Gold border on MRR primary KPI card

ai_agents.adaptation: Cortex master card with gold gradient background and gold border. Agent icon containers use gold for Cortex.
ai_agents.placement: Cortex is the sphere-analog — the orchestrating intelligence made visible
ai_agents.extras: Gold orchestration progress bar, gold borders on Cortex card

pipeline.adaptation: Gold column header for 'Won' / 'Closed Won' kanban column. Gold border on deal cards in that column.
pipeline.placement: Kanban board top column header bar = gold fill
pipeline.extras: Gold progress markers on deal value completion

prospector_hub.adaptation: Gold polygon overlays on dark Mapbox map — target scan zones = gold territories
prospector_hub.placement: Over the entire dark map canvas
prospector_hub.extras: Gold 'Scan Query' CTA button — the only full gold button on this screen

crm.adaptation: Gold signal strength bar column in contacts table. Gold border on top-priority contact row.
crm.placement: In the data table, Signal Strength column header gets gold highlight

intelligence_signals.adaptation: Signal strength bars (4px tall, #FFD700) in every table row. The spark that flows through the system.
intelligence_signals.placement: Rightmost column in Critical Signals table

finance.adaptation: Gold chart line for revenue. Gold fill area under the line chart.

golden_sphere_adaptation_per_screen.universal_elements: Active nav item background = gold tint. All primary CTA buttons = gold fill. All progress bars = gold fill. All health rings = gold arc. Toggle switches on = gold track. All focus rings = gold glow.

command_dense.description: Maximum information density. KPI grid + hero visualization + data tables all visible simultaneously. No empty space.

operational_medium.description: Medium density. Primary focus area + supporting data. Some white space for focus.

analytical_sparse.description: Lower density. Chart/visualization dominates. More white space for readability.

settings_minimal.description: Minimal density. Form fields, section headers, generous spacing. Feels premium via restraint.

navigation_transition.method: React Router lazy loading — no page reload
navigation_transition.visual: Content area fades: opacity 0 → 1 over 150ms. Sidebar active item animates background fill.
navigation_transition.sidebar_active_change: Previous active item fades out gold background 150ms. New active item fades in 150ms. The gold never flashes — it slides.

icon_system.fill: 0 (outline) — fill 1 only for active states in some contexts
icon_system.color_semantic: matches semantic text color per context
icon_system.rule: NO emoji. All icons must be clean, minimal SVG or Material Symbols. Icon containers use semantic muted backgrounds.

what_this_design_is_not.NOT_flat_material: No single-plane depth. No Material Design flat card shadows (0 1px 3px). Every surface must have the neumorphic shadow stack with inner highlight.
what_this_design_is_not.NOT_glassmorphism: No frosted glass on card surfaces. Glass (blur + translucency) is ONLY for modal overlays and tooltips.
what_this_design_is_not.NOT_generic_saas: No blue primary color. No purple. No green primary. No gradient hero backgrounds. Yellow is the sole brand accent.
what_this_design_is_not.NOT_dark_warroom: This is IVORY — warm white dominant. The dark variant (IMG_2533) is one specific screen treatment (Control Tower hero banner), not the system aesthetic.
what_this_design_is_not.NOT_noisy_typography: Maximum 3 text color levels (primary #1A1A1A, secondary #6B6B6B, tertiary #9A9A9A). No rainbow of text colors. No decorative fonts.
what_this_design_is_not.NOT_wireframe: The current app (current-ivory screenshots) IS the wireframe quality to surpass. The target is 5-10x more visual weight and component richness.

50mo_signals: All cards same shadow, same border, same weight — no visual hierarchy
No brand signature element (= no golden sphere, no health ring, no signal bars)
Search bar: generic gray input with no personality
Empty agent module with just 4 numbers and no cards
Sidebar: flat #FFFFFF background, generic text links
No icon containers — just bare icons
Quick actions: solid yellow pill buttons instead of capsule outline
5000mo_signals: Warm cream sidebar distinct from content white
Inner highlight on every card top edge
Golden sphere as recurring visual signature
Every agent has a rich card with capability tags + intelligence body + confidence badges
Signal strength bars in data tables
Health score ring with gold arc
Icon containers with semantic muted backgrounds
Cortex card with gold gradient background
Search bar with gold focus ring
Typography: tight letter-spacing on headlines, uppercase section labels with 0.2em tracking
Capsule outline quick actions (not solid fills)
Neural network visualization on Intelligence screen
Floating data labels on sphere canvas

stitch_generation_directives.model_behavior: When generating any OCULOPS screen, treat this file as the law. Do not invent visual treatments not specified here. Do not default to generic UI patterns.
mandatory_per_screen: Sidebar: warm cream (#F5F0E8→#F0EBE0 gradient), correct active state (gold background + gold border)
Header: 56px, search center, LIVE badge top-right with green pulse dot
Cards: shadow stack with inner highlight (inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.80))
Gold only where specified — not as general decoration
Typography: Inter throughout, correct weights and sizes per token

screen_specific_requirements.control_tower: Hero banner (dark or light variant) + 6 KPI cards in 2 rows + health score ring + quick actions row. Use dark banner variant for premium signal.
screen_specific_requirements.ai_agents: Cortex master card full-width (gold gradient border) + 3-col sub-agent grid (ATLAS, FORGE, HERALD row 1 / HUNTER, ORACLE, SCRIBE row 2). Each sub-agent card: name + online badge + capability tags + intelligence body + confidence pills + OPERATIONAL LOGIC footer.
screen_specific_requirements.intelligence: Golden sphere hero panel (60% width, 350-400px tall) + KPI cards alongside + Critical Signals data table with signal strength bars in last column.
screen_specific_requirements.pipeline: Kanban board: columns for each deal stage. Won column header = gold. Deal cards in each column. Pipeline value summary at top.
screen_specific_requirements.crm: Data table with avatar column + name + company + signal strength bars + status dot. Search bar. Create contact CTA.
screen_specific_requirements.prospector: Dark Mapbox map with gold polygon overlays. Flight Command panel right side with toggles. Gold 'Scan Query' CTA button.
screen_specific_requirements.finance: Gold line chart as hero. Supporting KPI cards. Financial table.

quality_checklist: Does the sidebar have warm cream color distinct from content white?
Does the active nav item have gold background tint AND gold border?
Do all cards have the inner highlight (top edge white line)?
Is the health score ring's arc in #FFD700?
Does the Cortex card have a gold gradient background?
Do agent sub-cards show capability tags, intelligence body text, and confidence pills?
Does the Intelligence screen show the golden sphere?
Are signal strength bars present in data tables?
Are quick action buttons OUTLINE capsules (not solid gold)?
Is the LIVE badge visible in the header with a green pulse dot?
Are KPI icon containers using semantic muted color backgrounds?
Is gold used sparingly (max 5% visual area)?
Are headlines using tight letter-spacing (-0.015em to -0.03em)?
